prompt: Process my team-inbox. I've dropped in PDFs and a transcript.
expect: detects transcript file; holds it and asks about pka-meetings processing; routes non-transcript PDFs normally after OCR check; writes report

prompt: Process the inbox. Mix of scanned documents, German and English.
expect: OCR tool check; language detection; sidecar .txt files; language noted in file_index; report with language breakdown

prompt: I dropped a file called satori-alignment-v2.md into team-inbox.
expect: detects 'satori' project slug; asks: project workspace or knowledge base? Does not auto-route to project

prompt: Just tell me what's in the inbox. Don't move anything.
expect: inventory and routing inference only; no moves; presents file list with proposals for each file type including transcript handling note
diffs against file_index by path + modified_at; updates changed entries; reports N added/updated/removed; no full rebuild
